newsSince: No material new company-specific news since June 9. The relevant datapoint remains Q1 2026 (reported early May): sequential recovery led by SoC/large driver ICs with strong Q2 double-digit growth guidance, but the recovery is notebook/tablet/TV display-cycle driven, not HBM/advanced-packaging/AI-networking.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the AI-node bottleneck lens Novatek has no claim to a top-55 node: the recovery is display-cycle (notebook/tablet/TV DDIC + SoC), not HBM/advanced-packaging/AI-networking. No new AI-relevant evidence since June 9; +48% YTD on a display name keeps eroding residual alpha. Continue down/out.
verdicts.bull: Strong Q2 double-digit guidance; high-end SoC/display IC recovery; cash-rich, well-run.
verdicts.neutral: Cyclical recovery confirmed but display-led, with no AI-bottleneck exposure.
verdicts.bear: Consumer/display-cycle name mis-ranked on an AI-node map; rerating outpaces the thesis.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Display upgrade cycle / new high-end SoC products
verdicts.primaryRisk: Consumer/display-cycle downturn; no AI choke-point lever

verdicts.rankRationale: On the CPO lens Novatek has effectively zero co-packaged-optics/silicon-photonics relevance; it is a display/consumer IC house. No new evidence since June 9 and +48% YTD worsens the asymmetry versus cleaner photonics/substrate names. Stays a remove candidate near the bottom.
verdicts.bull: Profitable, recovering display IC franchise with Q2 momentum.
verdicts.neutral: No CPO/HBM/packaging relevance; cycle recovery only.
verdicts.bear: Weakest-relevance name on a CPO list; should be removed from actionable alpha.
